projects.name: Checklist System
projects.description: Built an automated task management desktop application for daily tracking, enabling faster task completion and reducing manual documentation through Excel/PDF reporting.

projects.name: Movie Rating Analysis
projects.description: Developed a graph-based user-movie rating analysis project, constructing a graph from large datasets and implementing efficient query algorithms to solve analysis requirements.

projects.name: AI Game Projects (Tic-Tac-Toe & Pacman Search)
projects.description: Developed an 8x8 Tic-Tac-Toe game with AI using Alpha-Beta Pruning and implemented intelligent search for Pacman using UCS and A* with proposed heuristics.

projects.name: Apriori Algorithm with Hadoop MapReduce
projects.description: Implemented the Apriori algorithm with Hadoop MapReduce to discover frequent customer groups from large transactional data, utilizing HDFS and YARN, and tuning job parameters for scalability.

projects.name: PageRank with PySpark
projects.description: Crawled and built a directed graph of webpages, then implemented Google's PageRank algorithm in PySpark to evaluate and rank page importance, leveraging Spark for optimization.

projects.name: Football Object Detection using YOLOv11
projects.description: Trained a custom YOLOv11 model on 5K+ annotated frames for football object detection, achieving high mAP and deploying real-time detection with low latency.
